title: BarForce
description: BarForce: Resulting section forces in local coordinates along the bar.

FX.description: Axial force along the local x-axis. Positive for tension, negative for compression. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

FY.description: Shear force along the local y-axis. Generally minor axis shear force. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

FZ.description: Shear force along the local z-axis. Generally major axis shear force. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

MX.description: Torsional moment. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

MY.description: Bending moment about the local y-axis. Generally major axis bending moment. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

MZ.description: Bending moment about the local z-axis. Generally minor axis bending moment. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
